summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. All five seed PRs are open, maintainer-owned draft focused bug-fix PRs with maintainer labels, assignee signal, passing real-behavior proof, and ClawSweeper/Codex review comments saying they need maintainer review before merge. The job disables merge, fix, raise_pr, instant close, and low-signal closeout, so no mutation is safe to plan; each seed PR should remain open for maintainer technical review. Linked PRs #89119 and #89499 are useful context for overlapping diagnostics work, not closure targets for this inventory shard.
